references.reason: A small table at Heaven's edge keeps two seats and the unsigned contract level, rather than placing Tenshi above the player.
ASK, STOP, and REPAIR headings use separate high-contrast bands so the contract cannot be mistaken for a dare alone.
A simple terrain boundary map makes future keystone actions subject to explicit scope rather than assumed access.
Two equal empty signature lines and an unmarked romance clause make mutual choice and separate consent visible in one bit.
Friendship is a complete contract outcome with real challenge and exit terms.
Romance records a separate yes and a continuing stop clause.
The declined branch proves contract, attention, challenge, and exit remain without penalty.
Postponement preserves the contract without a relationship deadline.
Undecided preserves an irregular future without forcing an incident or label.
